name: Transcend Information, Inc.
summary: Transcend Information, Inc. engages in the manufacturing, processing, and sale of computer software and hardware, peripheral equipment, and other computer components worldwide. The company provides solid state drives; dashcams and accessories; body cameras and accessories; external storage products, such as portable hard drives, desktop external hard drives; memory cards, such as SD and micro SD cards, and compact flash drives; USB flash drives; desktop, laptop, Macbooks, and server and workstation memory modules; multimedia products, including digital music players and DVD writers; and card readers and accessories, as well as apple solutions. In addition, the company provides embedded solutions, such as SATA, PATA, Half-Slim, and mSATA SSD products; PATA and USB flash modules; memory cards, such as SD, microSD, compact flash, CFast 2.0, and MMC cards; and DRAM module solutions, as well as customized logo printing and content preloading services. Its products are used in embedded, gaming, transportation, healthcare, server, automation, and military industries. Transcend Information, Inc. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
